name: Clans of the Frosted north.
description:
There are four clans found in the bitting cold of the north.

They are all focused on survival and all built to the needs of their clans, what clan are you born into and how will your story pan out? Will you be a legend spoken about in the stars or will the cold claim your body allowing only your soul to travel to the skies.

A Warrior Cats inspired Bot.
creator: AGargoyle
